arguments.argument:
windowX=0 windowY=0 cursorPos=1 cursorX=10 cursorY=81 newQuestionDelay=20 //If at 100, it is waiting for a question to be answered cancelQuiz=0 bDoNotIncrement=0 //Used for question 50
currentQuestion=0 //The current question in the quiz's set maxQuestion=10 //Max questions in quiz numCorrect=0 //Number of questions answered correctly triviaScore=0 //The score at the end of the quiz
triviaQ="" triviaA1="" triviaA2="" triviaA3="" triviaA4="" triviaA5="" triviaA6="" rightAnswer=0
questionNum=0 //The question in the list (used for finding the question information) numInList=51 //Number of questions in the list
bTriviaReady=0 bTriviaComplete=0 alarm[0]=1
